title: 7S-rapport frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter of a 7S report Markdown file produced by the central application. Validates the machine-readable properties only; the Markdown body (the seven 7S fields) is specified in FORMAT_SPEC.md §5.

id.description: Stable unique identifier, unique across the whole vault. Format '7S-NNN' in sample data; any stable string (e.g. UUID) in production.

typ.description: Constant discriminator separating reports from other notes (e.g. entity stubs created later by the plugin).

tnr.description: Report TNR DDHHMM, optionally with a collision suffix _n. String (may carry leading zeros and underscore). Matches the filename TNR part without the 'TNR' prefix. This value is preserved from the incoming 7S report and may differ from the observation time in 'tidpunkt'.

tidpunkt.description: ISO 8601 local datetime (no timezone offset). The authoritative timestamp of the observation.

plats.description: Free-text place name. Always quoted in YAML because it may contain special characters.

lat.description: WGS84 latitude in decimal degrees (~5 decimals). Omit entirely if coordinates unknown — do not use null or 0.

lon.description: WGS84 longitude in decimal degrees (~5 decimals). Omit entirely if coordinates unknown.

sagesman.description: Reporting unit call sign as provided in the 7S report. Canonical platoon-level values are AQ/BQ/CQ/DQ/EQ, but production may use finer-grained signals; consumers should treat non-canonical values as warnings rather than schema failures.

location.description: Combined coordinate for the Obsidian Map View plugin (FORMAT_SPEC.md §8). REQUIRED when lat/lon are present and must mirror them exactly; omit only when coordinates are unknown. String form 'lat,lon' is used in this format; the [lat, lon] list form is also accepted by Map View.

allOf.$comment: When coordinates are present, 'location' must be the string form 'lat,lon'. (Exact equality with lat/lon is enforced by the application, not expressible in JSON Schema.)
